raw_transcript.speaker: Frau Berger
raw_transcript.text: Guten Morgen! Was darf es sein?

raw_transcript.speaker: Frau Berger
raw_transcript.text: Sehr gut! Das macht zwei Euro.

reviewer_output.overall_summary: Robert completed a very short bakery interaction using correct basic phrases. The session was minimal in scope, covering only a simple bread order with no errors, but also very little language production overall. Robert should aim to expand his turns with more detail and variety in future sessions.
strengths: Used the polite modal construction 'ich möchte' correctly instead of the more abrupt 'ich will'
Placed 'bitte' correctly at the end of the request
Responded naturally and politely with 'Danke schön' to close the transaction
reviewer_output.next_focus: Practice expanding bakery orders with quantities, adjectives, and additional items, for example: 'Ich möchte zwei Brötchen und ein Roggenbrot, bitte' — also practice asking for the price using 'Was kostet das?'
